description: May confronts Snowflake and they engage in a fierce fight until Sarge intervenes, capturing May and taking her as a hostage. The tension reaches a climax as May is overpowered, raising the stakes for S.H.I.E.L.D. and setting up future conflict with Sarge's team.

transcript.line: I've got the girl in my sights. Any sign of him?
Not yet. But if this guy wants to take out Deke Shaw, he's gonna have to wait in line.
You don't like guns either.
Never needed them.
Boys with their toys.
Aah!
If you'd like to make a call, please hang...
Aah!
You know who does like toys?
I do.
Are you posting this right now?
Wait, wait, stop.
You may be a talker, but you're still a target.
Here. Take this. Keep her safe.
I think we're good.
What... is... happening?!
Okay, Sequoia, you're probably pretty freaked out right now. So, this is Mack. He's...
He's large and muscular.
... an agent of S.H.I.E.L.D.
Everything okay? You need a doctor.
No, it's not as bad as getting shot.
Who even are you?
Get out of the way. I want him.
I got this. Okay. Go and protect her. Mack, come with me. I got a plan. Go, go, go, go, go!
Do what you're going to do or go to hell.
I think you might be the prettiest butterfly I've ever made.
Easy, Snow. Not this one.
If you're not gonna kill me, then what do you want?
You're about to find out.
What took you so long?
2 percent. I'll give you 2 percent of this entire company to keep this between us.
